calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On February 25, 2003
Off Calendar Feb-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Rodney L. Levin, Esq., for Bank of the West.
*The case came on regularly as scheduled for hearing today. The default was entered on 1/24/03 in favor of plaintiff against defendants Menendez Corporation, Carlos Menendez and Ana Menendez. Counsel presents his case. Witness Robert A. Hickey is sworn and examined. The court grants the default judgment on the following amount: $119,660.29 principle, $13,190.27 interest and late charges, $5,100.75 attorney fees, and $390.50 costs, for a total judgment of $138,341.81 against the above named defendants named in the default. Judgment signed in open court. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris, Clerks: P. Dias/Dianne Boffi, Reporter: La Von Granger
